step.title: Scan codebase
step.action: Scan the codebase for patterns that indicate technical debt: TODOs, FIXMEs, deprecated APIs, copy-paste duplication, missing tests.

step.title: Identify debt items
step.action: Catalogue each debt item with a description, location, and type (design debt, code debt, test debt, documentation debt).

step.title: Classify severity
step.action: Assign severity to each item: critical (blocks progress), high (causes recurring pain), medium (slows development), low (cosmetic or minor).

step.title: Recommend paydown order
step.action: Recommend a paydown order based on severity, impact, and effort. Prioritize items that unblock other work.

step.title: Produce report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md. Fill all sections with findings and recommendations.
